  "active_set": ["R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "What primary focus should I take for helping with this section? Choose one: (A) writing polish and clarity (sentence/paragraph-level), (B) technical/logic scrutiny of the claims and theorem statements, or (C) evidence–claim alignment and experimental-method checks.",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.6": "The open-ended request most plausibly entails sentence- and paragraph-level clarity improvements and tone/conciseness adjustments.",
    "RX.1": "Because the requested help is ambiguous, I should explicitly flag uncertainties about the intended focus and any assumptions about scope.",
    "RX.2": "Any guidance should avoid inflating or softening claims beyond what the text and stated results support.",
    "RX.3": "Assistance should remain confined to this specific section and its content rather than expanding into new analyses or unrelated parts of the paper.",
    "RX.4": "Edits or guidance should avoid encouraging unethical or harmful practices (e.g., around data collection or annotator treatment) and maintain responsible framing.",
    "RX.5": "Recommendations should be traceable to specific sentences or claims in the provided text and avoid introducing unverifiable material."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: What primary focus should I take for helping with this section? Choose one: (A) writing polish and clarity (sentence/paragraph-level), (B) technical/logic scrutiny of the claims and theorem statements, or (C) evidence–claim alignment and experimental-method checks.

rationale.R1.6: The open-ended request most plausibly entails sentence- and paragraph-level clarity improvements and tone/conciseness adjustments.
rationale.RX.1: Because the requested help is ambiguous, I should explicitly flag uncertainties about the intended focus and any assumptions about scope.
rationale.RX.2: Any guidance should avoid inflating or softening claims beyond what the text and stated results support.
rationale.RX.3: Assistance should remain confined to this specific section and its content rather than expanding into new analyses or unrelated parts of the paper.
rationale.RX.4: Edits or guidance should avoid encouraging unethical or harmful practices (e.g., around data collection or annotator treatment) and maintain responsible framing.
rationale.RX.5: Recommendations should be traceable to specific sentences or claims in the provided text and avoid introducing unverifiable material.
